name: data
description: Databricks notebooks and Python packages for OpenJII

scripts.install: command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && (uv sync --frozen || uv sync) || (echo 'uv not found, skipping python env sync' && exit 0)
scripts.lint: uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.clean: git clean -xdf .cache .turbo .venv dist src/lib/*/dist src/lib/*/build src/lib/*/*.egg-info
